name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: Smoke and showers and thunderstorms likely before 5pm, then smoke and showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 83, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. Southwest wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
